delivery_return.title: Delivery & Return
delivery_return.delivery_desc: You will receive your order within 3-5 business days inside Cairo and Giza, and within 3-7 business days outside these cities.
delivery_return.return_bullet_1: Digital products (such as codes, software, or subscriptions) are non-refundable once delivered or activated.
delivery_return.return_bullet_2: You can return your order within 14 days if it is in the same condition as received (Sealed package and Unopened), and 30 days if it is defective.
delivery_return.return_bullet_3: The refund method will be the same as the payment method except for cash on delivery payment method, the refund will be a bank transfer.
delivery_return.return_bullet_5: You can return your order by yourself to any of our stores or ship it to our warehouse (you will be charged for the return shipping fees).
delivery_return.return_bullet_6: In case of defective items, we will receive your items for inspection by their manufacturer to confirm whether they are eligible for return (the inspection period may vary from one manufacturer to another).
delivery_return.return_bullet_7: The refund process takes place once the returned products are received from the manufacturer in case they are defective or from the consumer if the package is sealed and unopened as received within (14) business days.
delivery_return.return_bullet_8: Please inspect the product upon receipt before opening the product package to ensure it matches your order. Returns will not be accepted if the product package is opened, even in case of incorrect items.
delivery_return.faq_q1: My order hasn't arrived yet. Where is it?
delivery_return.faq_a1: You will receive your order within 3-5 business days inside Cairo and Giza, and within 3-7 business days outside these cities. You can track your order through Orders page in your account.
delivery_return.faq_q2: Can I return my order after receiving it?
delivery_return.faq_a2: Yes, you can return your order within 14 days. Please review our Delivery & Return Policy.
delivery_return.faq_q3: Are there any taxes or customs duties that need to be paid after purchasing from your store?
delivery_return.faq_a3: All prices shown on the website are inclusive of VAT.

privacy.item_1_body:
We collect and process personal data voluntarily provided by users when accessing the Website or App, creating an account, or completing a purchase. Such data may include, but is not limited to: name, phone number, email address, shipping address, and payment details.

The email address online@spexeg.com and customer service number +201275555063 are official contact channels owned by Spex.
privacy.item_2_body:
Data is used to:
- Process orders and deliveries
- Communicate with users
- Improve services
- Comply with legal obligations
privacy.item_3_body:
- User data is not sold or rented.
- Data may be shared with service providers for order fulfillment.
privacy.item_4_body: We implement appropriate security measures to protect personal data.
privacy.item_5_body: Cookies are used to enhance user experience and analyze performance.
privacy.item_6_body: Users may request access, correction, or deletion of their personal data.
privacy.item_7_body: Our services are not intended for children under 13.
privacy.item_8_body: Spex reserves the right, at its sole discretion, to amend or update this Privacy Policy at any time. Continued use of the Website or App following such changes constitutes legal acceptance of the revised policy.

terms.item_1_body:
- Website / App: Refers to the website and mobile application owned and operated by the Company.
- Company: Spex is the legal entity owning and operating the platform.
- User / Customer: Any person who visits, registers, or purchases from the platform.
- Products: All electronic devices and accessories offered for sale.
terms.item_2_body: By accessing or using the Website or App, creating an account, or completing any transaction, you expressly acknowledge and legally agree to be fully bound by these Terms & Conditions and the Privacy Policy of Spex without limitation or condition. If you do not agree, please discontinue use.
terms.item_3_body:
- Users must be at least 18 years old or use the service under parental supervision.
- The Company reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts violating these terms.
terms.item_4_body:
- Users must provide accurate and up-to-date information.
- Users are responsible for maintaining account confidentiality.
- Spex shall not bear any legal or financial liability for any unauthorized use of a user account, and full responsibility rests with the user.
terms.item_5_body:
- Prices are displayed in Egyptian Pounds (EGP) and include applicable taxes unless stated otherwise.
- The Company may update prices or product details at any time.
- Product images and specifications are for illustration purposes only.
terms.item_6_body:
- The Company offers installment payment options through authorized third-party providers, subject to their terms and conditions.
- Orders are confirmed upon successful payment.
- The Company reserves the right to cancel orders without users' permissions due to circumstances that may include, but are not limited to: pricing issues, stock issues, or suspected fraud even if the order has already been confirmed or paid for.
- Payments are subject to third-party payment providers' terms.
terms.item_7_body:
- Shipping is available within Egypt unless stated otherwise.
- All delivery timelines provided are estimates only and are not legally binding, and may vary due to logistical factors or force majeure events beyond Spex's control.
- The Company is not responsible for courier delays.
terms.item_8_body:
- Digital products (such as codes, software, or subscriptions) are non-refundable once delivered or activated.
- You can return your order within 14 days if it is in the same condition as received (Sealed package and Unopened), and 30 days if it is defective.
- The refund method will be the same as the payment method except for cash on delivery payment method, the refund will be a bank transfer.
- Shipping fees is non-refundable.
- You can return your order by yourself to any of our stores or ship it to our warehouse (you will be charged for the return shipping fees).
- In case of defective items, we will receive your items for inspection by their manufacturer to confirm whether they are eligible for return (the inspection period may vary from one manufacturer to another).
- The refund process takes place once the returned products are received from the manufacturer in case they are defective or from the consumer if the package is sealed and unopened as received within (14) business days.
- Please inspect the product upon receipt before opening the product package to ensure it matches your order. Returns will not be accepted if the product package is opened, even in case of incorrect items.
terms.item_9_body:
- Products are covered by manufacturer or authorized distributor warranties.
- The Company is not responsible for misuse or improper handling.
terms.item_10_body: All content is owned or licensed by the Company and may not be reused without permission.
terms.item_11_body: Under no circumstances shall Spex be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or loss-of-profit damages arising out of or related to the use or inability to use the platform.
terms.item_12_body: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt.
terms.item_13_body: The Company may modify these Terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
